'''tajusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reachtruck|reachtruck]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reachtruck|reachtruck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tajusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæjisith|tæjisith]] || [[word:tæjisij|tæjisij]] || [[word:tæjisish|tæjisish]] || [[word:tæjisi|tæjisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajujusuth|tajujusuth]] || [[word:tajujusuj|tajujusuj]] || [[word:tajujusush|tajujusush]] || [[word:tajujusu|tajujusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajusuth|tajusuth]] || [[word:tajusuj|tajusuj]] || [[word:tajusush|tajusush]] || [[word:tajusu|tajusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajufsuth|tajufsuth]] || [[word:tajufsuj|tajufsuj]] || [[word:tajufsush|tajufsush]] || [[word:tajufsuf|tajufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tajusuthu|tajusuthu]] || [[word:tajusuju|tajusuju]] || [[word:tajusushu|tajusushu]] || [[word:tajusuku|tajusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tajusuth|tajusuth]] || [[word:tajusuj|tajusuj]] || [[word:tajusush|tajusush]] || [[word:tajusu|tajusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tajusuthul|tajusuthul]] || [[word:tajusujul|tajusujul]] || [[word:tajusushul|tajusushul]] || [[word:tajusukul|tajusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tajusuthuthu|tajusuthuthu]] || [[word:tajusujuju|tajusujuju]] || [[word:tajusushushu|tajusushushu]] || [[word:tajusuku|tajusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tajusuthun|tajusuthun]] || [[word:tajusujun|tajusujun]] || [[word:tajusushun|tajusushun]] || [[word:tajusukun|tajusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tajusuthuoro|tajusuthuoro]] || [[word:tajusujuoro|tajusujuoro]] || [[word:tajusushuoro|tajusushuoro]] || [[word:tajusukuoro|tajusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
